title: The Gentle Giants: Understanding Whale Migration
author: Dr. Sarah Chen
excerpt: Every year, thousands of humpback whales travel thousands of miles to breed in warm waters. We follow their journey.

title: Bioluminescence: Nature's Light Show
author: Elena Rossi
excerpt: Deep beneath the waves, creatures create their own light. Discover the science behind this magical phenomenon.

title: Sea Turtles: Ancient Navigators
author: Dr. Sarah Chen
excerpt: These remarkable creatures have existed for over 100 million years. Learn about their incredible navigation abilities.

title: Jellyfish: Drifting Through Time
author: Lena Frost
excerpt: These ethereal creatures have survived five mass extinctions. What makes them so resilient?
